label: Federal agency
description: US federal-government-operated facility

label: State agency
description: US state-government-operated facility

label: Local government
description: RESERVED — US county, city, or special district. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: University marine lab
description: University-operated marine or coastal laboratory

label: University institute
description: RESERVED — campus-based research institute or center. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Nonprofit
description: US 501(c)(3) research or conservation organization

label: Foundation
description: Grantmaking foundation

label: Network / consortium
description: Multi-institution network, consortium, or regional association

label: International federal agency
description: Non-US national-government agency

label: International university
description: Non-US university or marine laboratory

label: International nonprofit
description: Non-US NGO

label: Industry
description: RESERVED — private or industry research facility. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Research vessel
description: RESERVED — research vessel treated as a mobile facility. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Observatory
description: Cabled observatory or ocean observing platform

label: Virtual
description: RESERVED — organization without a single physical headquarters. No facilities ingested yet; slug kept for future coverage.

label: Federal protected area
description: Federally-managed protected area: National Wildlife Refuge, National Park / Seashore / Lakeshore / Monument, USFS Research Natural Area, USFS Experimental Forest, designated Wilderness, etc. Often the underlying land for terrestrial coastal-ecosystem research.

label: State protected area
description: State-managed protected area: state park, state wildlife management area, state nature preserve, state estuarine reserve, state aquatic preserve, etc.

label: Private protected area
description: Privately-managed conservation property: TNC preserve, Audubon sanctuary, regional land trust holding, conservation easement, etc.

label: University field station
description: University-operated terrestrial field station for forestry, ecology, hydrology, climate, or agroecology research. Counterpart to university-marine-lab.

label: Experimental forest / range
description: USDA Forest Service Experimental Forest or Experimental Range (Lugo et al. 2006) or USDA-ARS Range Research Laboratory. Long-term silvicultural / rangeland research property.

label: LTAR site
description: USDA-ARS Long-Term Agroecosystem Research site — paired conventional/aspirational cropping or rangeland system.

label: Flux tower / cluster
description: Eddy-covariance flux tower or cluster of towers (AmeriFlux, NEON, ARM, ChEAS, etc.).

label: Glacier monitoring site
description: Long-term glacier mass-balance, dynamics, or ice-core monitoring site (USGS Benchmark Glaciers, Juneau Icefield, etc.).

label: Atmospheric baseline observatory
description: NOAA Global Monitoring Laboratory baseline observatory (Mauna Loa, Barrow / Utqiaġvik, South Pole, American Samoa, Trinidad Head) or comparable WMO GAW global station.

label: Streamgage / hydrologic network
description: USGS National Water Information System (NWIS), Hydrologic Benchmark Network, WEBB, or other long-record hydrologic gauging program.
